HW: Hardware ID - Unique device serial number of the shoe
AC: Accelerometer - Measures movement/acceleration in (x, y, z) triplets
GY: Gyroscope - Measures rotation/angular velocity in (x, y, z) triplets
BT: Battery - Battery level percentage of the shoe device
FP: Flag Pointer - Connectivity flag (0 = real-time, 1 = offline/buffered)
PC: Packet Counter - Tracks number of transmitted packets
T: Type - Message type (BL = Body Left motion, BR = Body Right motion, PG = PPG optical)
BL: Body Left - Motion data from the left shoe
BR: Body Right - Motion data from the right shoe
PG: Photoplethysmography - Heart rate/blood oxygen optical sensor data
IR: Infrared - Infrared light sensor values for heart rate detection
RD: Red Light - Red light sensor values for SpO2 (blood oxygen) calculation
PPG: Photoplethysmography - Topic name for left shoe data stream (motion + PPG)
BPST_RIGHT: Body Posture Right - Topic name for right shoe data stream (motion only)
TP: Temperature - Temperature sensor (not active on right shoe)
Spo2: Blood Oxygen Saturation - SpO2 sensor (not active on right shoe)
